arg.name: robot_name
arg.description: Name of the robot or application for unique identification.

arg.name: prefix
arg.description: Prefix of the joint names, useful for multi-robot setup. If changed, also update joint names in the controllers' configuration.

arg.name: description_package
arg.description: Description package with robot URDF/xacro files.

arg.name: description_macro_file
arg.description: URDF/XACRO description file of the robot or application.

arg.name: configuration_package
arg.description: Package with configuration files, e.g., controllers, initial positions.

arg.name: controllers_file
arg.description: YAML file with the controllers configuration.

arg.name: initial_positions_file
arg.description: YAML file with the initial positions when using mock hardware from ros2_control.

arg.name: joint_limits_file
arg.description: YAML file with the STOMP planning configuration.

arg.name: use_eki_communication
arg.description: Use EKI communication to the KUKA Robot Controller (KR-C). If true, 'eki_robot_ip' and 'eki_robot_port' define the endpoint of robot controller to connect.

arg.name: eki_robot_ip
arg.description: IP address for the robot controller for communication using EKI protocol.

arg.name: eki_robot_port
arg.description: Port by which the robot can be reached for communication using EKI protocol.

arg.name: use_rsi_communication
arg.description: Use RSI communication to the KUKA Robot Controller (KR-C). If true, 'rsi_listen_ip' and 'rsi_robot_port' define the endpoint where the robot controller should connect.

arg.name: rsi_listen_ip
arg.description: IP address of a computer where robot controller should connect for communication using RSI protocol.

arg.name: rsi_listen_port
arg.description: Port on a computer where robot controller should connect for communication using RSI protocol.

arg.name: hardware_is_async
arg.description: Set the hardware to be asynchronous to the controller manager.

arg.name: use_mock_hardware
arg.description: Start robot with mock hardware mirroring command to its states.

arg.name: moveit_config_package
arg.description: Package with semantic robot description needed for MoveIt2.

arg.name: semantic_description_file
arg.description: Semantic robot description file (SRDF/XACRO) of the robot or application.

arg.name: rviz_file
arg.description: Rviz2 configuration file for visualization.

arg.name: activate_ros2_control
arg.description: YAML file with the OMPL planning configuration.

arg.name: use_mock_hardware_gripper
arg.description: Start gripper with mock hardware mirroring command to its states.

arg.name: use_external_gripper_driver
arg.description: Start gripper with mock hardware mirroring command to its states.

arg.name: additional_xacro_args
arg.description: Additional xacro args.

arg.name: description_kuka_file
arg.description: YAML file with the OMPL planning configuration.

arg.name: kuka_common_moveit_pkg
arg.description: YAML file with the OMPL planning configuration.

arg.name: ompl_planning_file_path
arg.description: YAML file with the OMPL planning configuration.

arg.name: pilz_planning_file_path
arg.description: YAML file with the Pilz planning configuration.

arg.name: stomp_planning_file_path
arg.description: YAML file with the STOMP planning configuration.

arg.name: move_group_config_file_path
arg.description: YAML file with the STOMP planning configuration.

arg.name: pilz_cartesian_limits_file_path
arg.description: YAML file with the STOMP planning configuration.

arg.name: moveit_controllers_file_path
arg.description: YAML file with the STOMP planning configuration.

arg.name: robot_description_planning_config
arg.description: YAML file with the STOMP planning configuration.

arg.name: moveit_controllers
arg.description: YAML file with the MoveIt configuration.

let.name: robot_description_content
let.value: $(command '$(find-exec xacro) $(var description_kuka_file) \ robot_name:=$(var robot_name) \ prefix:=$(var prefix) \ description_package:=$(var description_package) \ description_macro_file:=$(var description_macro_file) \ use_eki_communication:=$(var use_eki_communication) \ eki_robot_ip:=$(var eki_robot_ip) \ eki_robot_port:=$(var eki_robot_port) \ use_rsi_communication:=$(var use_rsi_communication) \ rsi_listen_ip:=$(var rsi_listen_ip) \ rsi_listen_port:=$(var rsi_listen_port) \ is_async:=$(var hardware_is_async) \ use_mock_hardware:=$(var use_mock_hardware) \ use_mock_hardware_gripper:=$(var use_mock_hardware_gripper) \ additional_xacro_args:=$(var additional_xacro_args) \ activate_ros2_control:=$(var activate_ros2_control) \ initial_positions_file:=$(find-pkg-share $(var configuration_package))/config/$(var initial_positions_file)')

let.name: robot_description_semantic_content
let.value: $(command '$(find-exec xacro) \ $(find-pkg-share $(var moveit_config_package))/srdf/$(var semantic_description_file) \ robot_name:=$(var robot_name) \ prefix:=$(var prefix)')
